item.description: The loved-up pair fronted the media for the pop star’s latest premiere.

item.description: The returning champ has left commentators in awe, with one part of her game ‘looking better than ever’.

item.description: Theories flooded social media after a glowing object lit up the sky before experts revealed the truth behind the spectacle.

item.description: From a cheesy beef pasta bake to a hearty lentil and rice dish, Katie Lolas proves affordable dinners can still be full of flavour.

item.description: ‘A life ended far too soon doing what he loved the most.’

item.description: Video of the alleged unprovoked attack shocked the world.

item.description: The premier has labelled the incident as ‘startling’.

item.description: Mobs have stormed neighbourhoods in Northern Ireland after a Sudanese national was accused of an attempted beheading.

item.description: The massive blaze engulfed seven apartment buildings and killed 168 people.

item.description: ‘We do not want this terrible tragedy to be used to divide people or fuel hostility.’

item.description: Warm up with a bowl of Nonna Teresa’s comforting chicken and vegetable soup before finishing with her crowd-favourite Nutella crescent biscuits.

item.description: A routine evening walk took an unexpected turn.

item.title: Miracle play helps New York Knicks complete greatest comeback in NBA Finals history
item.description: The Knicks are one win away from glory after the Spurs blew a 29-point lead.

item.title: Coolangatta Pie Shop to close after 62 years as rising costs force iconic Gold Coast bakery to shut
item.description: Generations of locals have shared their memories as the beloved institution prepares to serve its final pie.

item.description: A coroner found the patient may still be alive had she not been discharged from hospital.

item.description: Despite years of investigations, the cause still remains unknown.

item.description: ‘I think we should hold you accountable.’

item.title: Middle East war: Trump calls off strikes on Iran citing breakthrough in peace negotiations
item.description: The reversal comes after the US launched a barrage of airstrikes in retaliation to an Iranian attack.

item.description: Aussie legend Mark Schwarzer has identified a number of stars ready to make their mark at the World Cup.

item.title: Labor and Liberal politicians in fiery clash as One Nation raises millions in snap fundraiser
item.description: Pauline Hanson has called in the auditors after her Fire The Liar campaign raked in $2.7 million.

item.title: Thailand’s Princess Bajrakitiyabha Narendira Debyavati dies at 47 after illness
item.description: The popular royal was rushed to hospital after suddenly collapsing in 2022 and never regained consciousness.

item.description: Matthew Bielefeld’s ‘soulmate’ has shared painful details about the race, and a trophy she’s keeping close to her heart.

item.description: The breakthrough comes days after confronting footage emerged from the violent incident.

item.description: One of the modern greats of the game has announced his retirement, effective immediately.

item.title: Locals fighting AI data centre expansion plans near their Melbourne homes
item.description: Locals claim the proposal would make it harder to live in the suburban community.

item.title: Young Aussie’s advice after switching to a ‘dumbphone’ and escaping modern technology: ‘Destroy it’
item.description: Despite losing a majority of his connections, he says his life improved.

item.description: The changes could set back progress made with the world-leading treatment, says an expert.

item.title: Elon Musk crowned world’s first trillionaire as SpaceX skyrockets in Wall Street debut
item.description: The South African tech mogul has amassed more wealth than the GDP of all but 21 countries.

item.description: The animal was led through the rally ahead of a hotly-contested political race.

item.description: Eating this product could cause illness or injury.

item.description: An initial plan is due to be signed on Sunday, says US President Donald Trump and mediators from Pakistan, but Iran seems less certain.

item.description: Molly-Mae had hinted the much-anticipated name reveal would come during Fury’s bout.

item.description: ‘It was the best thing I’ve ever done.’

item.title: Russian warship opens fire at British yacht in the English Channel
item.description: Shots were fired at a civilian vessel near Isle of Wight as tensions between London and Moscow intensify.
